case_title: RONALD W. HARDIN PHOTOGRAPHY VS GANSON LTD. A CALIFORNIA CORP.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,500.00 FILED BY RONALD W. HARDIN PHOTOGRAPHY AS TO DEFENDANT GANSON LTD. A CALIFORNIA CORP. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-13-1997 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GANSON LTD. A CALIFORNIA CORP.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RONALD W. HARDIN PHOTOGRAPHY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT GANSON LTD. A CALIFORNIA CORP. COURT DETERMINES THAT THE STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS HAS EXPIRED ON ANY VIABLE CLAIM THAT PLFT MAY HAVE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
